# Upgrade Plan — WeatherMCPServer

## Summary
Assessment indicates the solution and projects already target net9.0 and show no compatibility issues. No code changes are required to move to net9.0.

## Goal
Validate build and tests on the confirmed target framework (net9.0) and apply any non-breaking package updates if desired.

## Tasks
1. 01-verify-build — Verify the solution builds and run tests (Validation)

## Done when
- Solution builds without errors
- Warnings addressed for modified projects
- Tests (if any) pass
